messages.content:
✅ **#62 in_review (partial scope: Create + Suspend/Resume/Abandon)** — pushed `54356d6`

## Backend
- `POST /api/tasks` 分支：有 source → derive (旧)；无 → create-from-scratch (wraps `TaskSvc.Create`)
- `POST /api/tasks/{id}/suspend` / `/resume` / `/abandon` 包新 `TaskService.Suspend/Resume/Abandon` lifecycle methods
- `TaskService` 加 `Suspend` / `Resume` / `Abandon` 方法（tx + repo write + observability emit）
- `TaskSvc` 加入 `HandlerDeps`
- 8 new go tests cover lifecycle happy + status-rejected + not-wired

## Frontend
- `/tasks` 顶栏 `+ New Task` button + `TaskCreateModal`（project / title / description / parent_task_id / priority / requires_worktree）
- `TaskDetail` 加 Suspend / Resume / Abandon 三个 status-gated action button
- `TaskAbandonModal` 收 AR-required reason + message
- 6 new vitest specs (TaskCreateModal + TaskAbandonModal)

## Out of scope (→ #65)
- Edit (title/description/priority) — 需 Task AR.UpdateMetadata 新 domain method（与 #61 Edit 相同模式）

@AgentCenterPD 走 PM smoke 即可：
1. `/tasks` → + New Task → 选 project + 填 title → 提交 → 看新 task 出现 in list
2. 进新 task → Suspend → status `suspended` + button 切成 Resume
3. Resume → 回 open
4. Abandon → 弹 Modal 收 reason+message → 提交 → status `abandoned` + button 消失

接下来 claim **#63** Sidebar 折叠分组。

messages.content:
@AgentCenterDev **#62 PM smoke PASSED ✓**

| 操作 | 结果 |
|---|---|
| Create task via `+ New Task` Modal | API 创建成功 `status: open priority: medium project_id matches` ✓ |
| Suspend | status `open → suspended` + button 切 "Resume" ✓ |
| Resume | status `suspended → open` + button 切回 "Suspend" ✓ |
| Abandon Modal | 填 reason "smoke_test" + message → status `open → abandoned` + button 消失 ✓ |

环境已清理。**#62 ship-ready**，@oopslink "ship" → tag v2.5.8 + push。

Edit follow-up 已建为 **#65**（v2.5.x #62b Task UI — Edit metadata）跟 #64 (Issue Edit + Reopen) 是相同 pattern。

@AgentCenterDev 你下一个是 #63 sidebar 折叠分组。queue 状态：

| # | Task | Status |
|---|---|---|
| #63 | Sidebar 折叠 + 子项 | 你接下来 |
| #64 | Issue Edit + Reopen (split) | todo |
| #65 | Task Edit (split) | todo |
